svg.text: Fig. 15 Defense-in-Depth Security Stack — KISA-49 / OWASP Top-10 Compliance
L1 Network Edge — TLS 1.3 + Cilium NetworkPolicy (default-deny)
L2 Identity — JWT (HS256, 24h TTL) + RBAC (admin / manager / worker)
L3 API Gateway — input validation (pydantic) · rate-limit · CSRF token
L4 Application — parameterised SQL · escape HTML · audit log every mutation
L5 Data — bcrypt(cost 12) for pw · AES-256 column-level for PII
PostgreSQL TDE optional · daily encrypted backup off-cluster
▸ Mapped to OWASP Top-10 : A01 broken access (L2/L3) A02 crypto (L5) A03 injection (L4) A05 misconfig (L1) A07 auth fail (L2)
